price: am Sitz der Wahrhaftigkeit, bei einem allmächtigen Herrscher.
arabic: فِي مَقۡعَدِ صِدۡقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٖ مُّقۡتَدِرِۭ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: fī maqʿadi ṣid'qin ʿinda malīkin muq'tadirin
